selection.reason: The central ledger showed TheOpenAbove as the oldest eligible tracked non-Cavalry Publish repo by latest review timestamp at the start of this run.

excludedRepos.reason: Standing rule: do not work on Cavalry of Rome.

productDirection.currentGap: The live runtime is balloon-first, but README.md, package.json, and src/data/campaign.config.js still describe older free-flight or bird-flight mechanics while src/main.js owns the real drift constants, route-ready snapshot seam, and GameHost projection inline.
productDirection.recommendedDecision: Make balloon drift config authoritative, define replayable route object and route event contracts, project mission/progression snapshots, and prove Meadow Lift route replay before extracting host, renderer, world, camera, or physics services.
productDirection.recommendedVerticalSlice: TheOpenAbove Route Replay Fixture Authority + Mission Snapshot Contract Lock

runtimeEvidence.package: package.json still describes a standalone free-flight exploration game.
runtimeEvidence.readme: README.md still says free-flight exploration with carving, gliding, diving, boosting, thermals, wind gates, pitch/bank controls, and sky perch return.
runtimeEvidence.campaignConfig: src/data/campaign.config.js still exports CAMPAIGN, WORLD, and legacy FLIGHT with thermalTarget, gateTarget, pitch/roll/boost fields.
runtimeEvidence.main: src/main.js owns runtime host, terrain, world objects, key state, balloon state, wind sampling, drift physics, HUD, telemetry, snapshot(), and GameHost projection.
runtimeEvidence.visualObjectKit: src/hot-air-balloon-object-kit.js declares the balloon object kit and subdomains for envelope, mouth, streamers, seams, basket, rigging, burner, and ropes.
runtimeEvidence.smoke: tests/smoke.mjs has static marker coverage and should gain config-authority plus DOM-free route replay coverage next.

currentImplemented: create Three.js scene, camera, renderer, lights, fog, shadows, and frame loop
generate terrain, lakes, trees, clouds, and wind ribbons
collect burner / vent key state and zoom wheel input
sample wind angle and wind speed inline
integrate buoyancy, venting, damping, ceiling softness, velocity, position, altitude, and distance
update basket-follow camera and HUD telemetry
publish Nexus Engine balloon snapshot and tick event
targetProductLoop: start Meadow Lift as balloon pilot
load authoritative BALLOON_DRIFT, ALTITUDE_BANDS, ROUTE_OBJECTS, and WIND_LANE_HINTS
resolve current altitude band from numeric balloon altitude
evaluate the next route object from source descriptors
emit accepted or rejected RouteEventResult records
reduce route object state and route event journal
reduce ordered Meadow Lift mission state
unlock Cloud Basin only after valid landing completion
project mission, progression, routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, and routeFixture through GameHost
prove replay behavior in DOM-free smoke
recommendedServiceLoop: evaluate route object proximity and altitude constraints
emit accepted or rejected RouteEventResult records
reduce ordered Meadow Lift mission state
project routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, mission, progression, and routeFixture into snapshot

nextCutover.name: TheOpenAbove Route Replay Fixture Authority + Mission Snapshot Contract Lock
orderedSteps: Preserve current balloon visuals, burner / vent controls, camera, HUD telemetry, and GameHost shape.
Update README.md and package.json away from free-flight / bird-flight language.
Update Meadow Lift copy away from thermals, wind gates, pitch, bank, boost, and sky-perch return.
Add BALLOON_DRIFT beside legacy FLIGHT in src/data/campaign.config.js.
Move current inline values from src/main.js into BALLOON_DRIFT without changing behavior.
Keep FLIGHT as compatibility-only until smoke confirms no live runtime dependency.
Add ALTITUDE_BANDS for low-clearance, route-gate, high-drift, and landing-window states.
Add ROUTE_OBJECTS for buoyancy-gate-01, buoyancy-gate-02, buoyancy-gate-03, and meadow-perch-landing.
Add WIND_LANE_HINTS for readable route guidance.
Create pure altitude band resolver.
Create pure route object evaluator.
Create route order policy and stable rejection reasons.
Create RouteEventResult envelope with before/after state and snapshotTick.
Create route state reducer and route event journal.
Create Meadow Lift mission reducer.
Create Cloud Basin unlock progression reducer.
Project mission, progression, routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, and routeFixture through GameHost.
Add one compact HUD mission line.
Extend tests/smoke.mjs with DOM-free route replay fixture cases.
Defer host extraction, render extraction, world extraction, camera extraction, and balloon physics extraction until route smoke passes.
acceptance: README.md describes hot-air-balloon drift, burner, vent, route gates, and landing.
package.json description no longer says free-flight exploration.
src/data/campaign.config.js exports BALLOON_DRIFT, ALTITUDE_BANDS, ROUTE_OBJECTS, and WIND_LANE_HINTS.
FLIGHT is marked compatibility-only or protected by smoke coverage proving it is not live authority.
src/main.js reads live drift constants from BALLOON_DRIFT.
RouteEventResult records include eventId, objectId, eventType, accepted, reason, before, after, and snapshotTick.
out-of-order route attempts reject with reason=out_of_order.
wrong-altitude route attempts reject with reason=invalid_altitude_band.
already-completed route objects reject with reason=already_completed.
unknown route objects reject with reason=unknown_route_object.
in-order route fixture completes three buoyancy gates.
cloud-basin unlocks only after meadow-lift completion.
window.GameHost.getState().local exposes mission, progression, routeObjects, routeEvents, routeDiagnostics, and routeFixture.
HUD shows one compact mission line without noisy UI growth.
DOM-free smoke proves route replay and rejection parity.
Host, render, world, camera, and physics extraction remain out of scope.

validation.notes: Documentation-only run through GitHub source reads and contents commits.
